# Taypro

> Taypro Private Limited — Pune, India OEM of autonomous solar panel cleaning robots for utility-scale solar farms. 5 GW+ robot capacity deployed across 150+ live sites; waterless field robots (GLYDE, NYUMA, HELYX, tracker variants), NECTYR fleet operations portal, and ORION plant intelligence (roadmap).

Taypro builds the autonomous operations layer for utility-scale solar in India: waterless robots on every row, live fleet monitoring through NECTYR, and plant intelligence via ORION. Canonical English URLs below; localized pages use the same paths under `/hi/`, `/ar/`, `/ja/`, and `/bn/`. Primary topic: solar panel cleaning robot. Approved public figures only: 5 GW+ deployed, 150+ sites, 188 GWh+ additional generation recovered, 700M+ litres water saved annually, 99% cleaning efficiency, 600+ robots manufactured per month.

## Contact

- [Contact form](https://taypro.in/contact): Quotes, technical discussions, and factory visits
- [Sales email](mailto:sales@taypro.in): sales@taypro.in
- [Sales phone](tel:+918043843569): +91 80438 43569 (Mon–Fri 9:00 AM–6:00 PM IST)
- [Headquarters](https://taypro.in/contact): T3-906, Kohinoor World Towers, Pimpri Colony, Pune, Maharashtra 411019, India
- [Manufacturing hub](https://taypro.in/contact): Chakan, Pune, Maharashtra 410501, India

- [Homepage](https://taypro.in/): Company overview, proof stats, and primary calls-to-action

## Solar panel cleaning robots

- [Cleaning systems overview](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system): All robot models, OPEX/CAPEX paths, and fleet software
- [GLYDE — automatic fixed-tilt](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/automatic-solar-panel-cleaning-system): Flagship dual-pass microfiber robot for fixed-tilt utility plants
- [GLYDE-X — single-axis trackers](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/automatic-solar-panel-cleaning-system-for-single-axis-trackers): Dual-pass microfiber robot for trackers
- [NYUMA — automatic fixed-tilt](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/nyuma-automatic-cleaning-robot): PBT single-pass robot for fixed-tilt plants
- [NYUMA-X — tracker robot](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/nyuma-x-single-axis-tracker-cleaning-robot): PBT single-pass robot for single-axis trackers
- [HELYX — semi-automatic](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/semi-automatic-solar-panel-cleaning-system): Pick-and-place PBT robot for distributed plants
- [MINY — rooftop C&I](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/miny-compact-rooftop-cleaning-robot): Compact robot for commercial rooftops
- [CRADYL docking station](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/cradyl-row-transfer-docking-station): Row-transfer and docking for long tracker rows
- [NECTYR fleet portal](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/automatic-cleaning-robot-monitoring-app): Schedules, logs, tickets, and fleet dashboards
- [ORION plant intelligence](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/orion-plant-intelligence-platform): Plant health and intelligence roadmap
- [Cleaning service](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/solar-panel-cleaning-service): Robot service, AMC, and maintenance offerings
- [Cleaning technology](https://taypro.in/cleaning-technology): Waterless dual-pass cleaning science and methods
- [Solar panel cleaning machine](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-machine): Machine category landing for buyer discovery

## Buyer guides and calculators

- [Robot price guide India](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-price-india): CAPEX bands, cost drivers, and manufacturer evaluation
- [ROI price calculator](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-price-calculator): Investment payback and cost-savings estimator
- [CAPEX vs OPEX guide](https://taypro.in/solar-cleaning-capex-vs-opex): Procurement decision guide for Indian utility IPPs
- [Solar cleaning service India](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-service-india): National OPEX/CAPEX service and pan-India coverage
- [Solar O&M services](https://taypro.in/solar-om-services): Robotic cleaning, NECTYR monitoring, and SLA framework
- [OPEX pricing per MW](https://taypro.in/solar-cleaning-opex-pricing): Cost per MW and manual vs robotic comparison
- [Soiling loss calculator](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-soiling-loss-calculator): MWh and revenue impact from soiling
- [Tracker cleaning robots](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-for-trackers): GLYDE-X, NYUMA-X, and CRADYL buyer guide
- [Rooftop cleaning robots](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-for-rooftop): MINY guide for commercial C&I rooftops
- [Large-scale solar cleaning](https://taypro.in/large-scale-solar-panel-cleaning): 50–500 MW deployment capability
- [Robot manufacturer India](https://taypro.in/solar-cleaning-robot-manufacturer-india): Pune OEM evaluation for utility buyers
- [Fleet monitoring software](https://taypro.in/solar-fleet-monitoring-software): NECTYR operations portal and ORION intelligence
- [Plant data intelligence](https://taypro.in/solar-plant-data-intelligence): Telemetry, analytics, and plant health roadmap
- [Enterprise partnerships](https://taypro.in/enterprise-solar-cleaning-partnership): Multi-site IPP and CPSU portfolio programs

## Comparisons

- [Taypro vs Indian robot companies](https://taypro.in/compare/taypro-vs-indian-solar-cleaning-robot-companies): Landscape comparison for Indian utility buyers
- [Robot vs manual cleaning](https://taypro.in/compare/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-vs-manual-cleaning): Cost, safety, water use, and performance
- [Taypro vs Solabot](https://taypro.in/compare/taypro-vs-solabot): Head-to-head competitor comparison
- [Taypro vs Skilancer](https://taypro.in/compare/taypro-vs-skilancer): Head-to-head competitor comparison
- [Taypro vs Aegeus](https://taypro.in/compare/taypro-vs-aegeus): Head-to-head competitor comparison
- [Taypro vs Vayu Solar](https://taypro.in/compare/taypro-vs-vayu-solar): Head-to-head competitor comparison
- [Waterless vs water-based cleaning](https://taypro.in/compare/waterless-vs-water-based-solar-cleaning): Technology and O&M trade-offs
- [GLYDE vs NYUMA](https://taypro.in/compare/glyde-vs-nyuma): Dual-pass microfiber vs PBT single-pass for fixed-tilt
- [GLYDE-X vs NYUMA-X](https://taypro.in/compare/glyde-x-vs-nyuma-x): Tracker robot model comparison

- [Haryana](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-haryana): Utility and C&I solar robots in Haryana
